name: Proposal Email
subject: Proposal for {{company}}
body:
Your Proposal is Ready 📄


Hi {{name}} 👋,

Thank you for taking the time to discuss your requirements with us.

Based on our conversation, we've prepared a proposal tailored specifically for {{company}}. We believe it aligns well with your goals and outlines how GIC FOLKS can support your business.

Please take a moment to review the proposal. If you have any questions, need any modifications, or would like to discuss it further, I'd be happy to assist.

We look forward to your feedback and hope to work together soon.


Best regards,
{{assignedTo}}
GIC FOLKS Team

name: Closing Email
subject: Closing Your Inquiry
body:
Thank You, {{name}}


Hi {{name}} 👋,

Since we haven't heard back from you, we'll go ahead and close your inquiry for now.

If your requirements change in the future or you'd like to continue the conversation, simply reply to this email. We'll be happy to assist you.

Thank you for considering GIC FOLKS. We appreciate your time and wish you all the best.


Best regards,
{{assignedTo}}
GIC FOLKS Team

name: Meeting Request
subject: Can We Schedule a Quick Meeting?
body:
Let's Connect, {{name}} 🤝


Hi {{name}} 👋,

I'd love the opportunity to learn more about your goals and discuss how GIC FOLKS can help {{company}}.

Would you be available for a quick 20–30 minute meeting sometime this week? Please let me know a time that works best for you.


Looking forward to speaking with you.


Best regards,
{{assignedTo}}
GIC FOLKS Team

name: Nurture Email
subject: Helpful Resources for {{company}}
body:
A few resources for {{name}} 📚


Hi {{name}} 👋,

I hope you're doing well.

I wanted to share a few insights and resources that may help {{company}} while evaluating your options.

If you have any questions or would like to discuss your requirements, I'd be happy to help.


Best regards,
{{assignedTo}}
GIC FOLKS Team

name: Follow Up Email
subject: Following Up – {{company}}
body:
Following up — {{name}}


Hi {{name}} 👋,

I wanted to follow up on our recent conversation about the {{company}} opportunity.


Could we schedule a quick call this week to move things forward?


Best regards,
{{assignedTo}}
GIC FOLKS Team

name: Welcome email
subject: Welcome to GIC FOLKS, {{name}}!
body:
Welcome to GIC FOLKS, {{name}}! 👋


Thank you for reaching out to us. We're excited to connect with you.

Our team will be in touch shortly to discuss how we can help you.


Best regards,
{{assignedTo}}
GIC FOLKS Team
